allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's/Made with care in London\\./Made with care in Calgary, AB./g' menu.html)
Bash(python3 skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "restaurant food editorial magazine landing hero" --design-system -p "Chick N Fish")

Bash(curl -s -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 16_0 like Mac OS X\) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Version/16.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1" "https://www.popeyeschicken.ca" -o /tmp/popeyes.html)

Bash(curl -s -L --compressed -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 16_0 like Mac OS X\) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Version/16.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1" "https://www.popeyeschicken.ca" -o /tmp/popeyes_decoded.html)

Bash(curl -s -L -H 'Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br' -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 16_0 like Mac OS X\) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Version/16.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1" https://www.popeyeschicken.ca -o /tmp/popeyes_raw.gz)
